DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT PROFOOD TROPICAL FRUITS, INC.'s DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Profood Tropical Fruits, Inc. (Profood Tropical) demurs to certain causes of action of plaintiff Henry Sy's third amended complaint (TAC). Profood Tropical contends that Sy's third cause of action for violations of the Unfair Competition Law (UCL) fail to state a claim, are time barred and uncertain, and that Sy lacks standing. Profood Tropical makes the same contentions about the fifth cause of action for intentional interference with prospective economic advantage. The court takes all of the facts pleaded in the TAC as true and gives the complaint a liberal construction. For the reasons stated herein, the court overrules the demurrer to the third cause of action and sustains it without leave to amend as to the fifth cause of action.

(See word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, with a cover letter demonstrating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion For A Determination Of Good Faith Settlement (Ccp Section 877.6) By Plaintiff/Crossdefendant Henry Sy And Defendant/Cross-Complainant Eliseo Sy; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
